name: Rampaging Smashtank Rhynosaber
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>驀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>進</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>甲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ライノセイバー
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
You can discard any number of cards; this card gains 700 ATK for each card discarded. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can send this card to the GY; Special Summon monsters from your GY whose total Levels equal 7, except "Rampaging Smashtank Rhynosaber", but their effects are negated. You can only use each effect of "Rampaging Smashtank Rhynosaber" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
